title: Hornet Removal in Fort Greene, Brooklyn | $350-$550
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal services in Fort Greene, Brooklyn. Safe elimination of hornet nests from brownstones and buildings. Licensed experts. Call for fast service!
intro: Fort Greene residents face hornet problems in their historic brownstones, Fort Greene Park, and tree-lined streets, especially during warmer months. Our professional hornet removal service provides safe, effective elimination of aggressive hornet nests from your property. Best Pest Control NYC offers fast response times and guaranteed results for Fort Greene homeowners and businesses.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Fort Greene for years, understanding the unique challenges of hornet infestations in this historic Brooklyn neighborhood's diverse architecture. Our licensed technicians use safe, eco-friendly methods perfect for Fort Greene's family-friendly environment and proximity to the park.
localContext: Fort Greene's beautiful tree canopy along streets like South Portland Avenue and proximity to Fort Greene Park create ideal hornet nesting conditions in building eaves, porches, and trees. The neighborhood's mix of historic brownstones, modern condos, and the Brooklyn Academy of Music area all experience seasonal hornet activity requiring professional intervention.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Fort Greene?
faqs.answer: We typically respond to Fort Greene hornet removal calls within 24 hours and can often provide same-day service. The removal process itself usually takes 1-2 hours depending on nest size and location. We prioritize emergency situations where hornets pose immediate danger to residents or are near high-traffic areas like stoops and entrances.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 hornet removal price?
faqs.answer: Our price includes a thorough inspection, complete nest removal, treatment of the area to prevent re-infestation, and safe disposal of the nest. The final cost depends on nest size, location accessibility, and height (ground level vs. second or third story). We provide a firm quote after our initial assessment of your Fort Greene property.

faqs.question: Are hornets common in Fort Greene Park and surrounding areas?
faqs.answer: Yes, Fort Greene Park's mature trees and the neighborhood's abundant greenery create favorable conditions for hornets, especially in late summer and early fall. Hornets often build nests in tree branches, under eaves of brownstones, and in attics. We see increased activity near the park and on streets with heavy tree coverage.

faqs.question: Is hornet removal safe for my Fort Greene brownstone or children playing nearby?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use targeted, EPA-approved treatments that are safe for your historic property, children, and pets. Our technicians wear protective gear and establish safety perimeters during removal. We recommend keeping children and pets indoors during the treatment, but the area is typically safe within a few hours after service completion.
